title: pteris hexagona var. multifida
intro: Pteris hexagona var. multifida, also known as the multifida fern or Australian fern, is a variety of the Pteris hexagona fern species, characterized by its unique, deeply lobed fronds. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Pteris hexagona var. multifida include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis and eczema. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the herbal preparation often used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
